title: Competitive analysis: CSS selectors, Rust perf, scenario expect, XP sharing
desc: Four competitive landscape items for WKAppBot roadmap: CSS selector support alongside grap, scenario action-expect-recovery pattern, community Experience DB sharing, Rust UIA enumeration evaluation. All deferred as backlog.
steps: CSS selectors: support >> [role=button][name=Save] for external users while keeping grap as the power internal syntax. Bridge target = Claude Code / Playwright-style selectors for public API layer.
Scenario expect+recovery: per-step action-expect-recovery with auto-retry before failing. Similar to Playwright expect() assertions. Roadmap candidate for v7.0 scenario engine.
Experience DB sharing + Rust eval: community profile export/import (experience.json) for public utility. Rust for UIA enumeration hot-paths -- benchmark first (see benchmarks/ if created).
author: claude
